findings.description: The knowledge file states `nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpResponseHandler` is the "XMLコンフィグ" (XML config) name for the same handler as `nablarch.fw.handler.HttpResponseHandler`, implying they are two names for the same class. The source document never establishes this relationship. The header declares the class name as `nablarch.fw.handler.HttpResponseHandler`, and XML config examples use `nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpResponseHandler`, but the source makes no statement that these are alternative names for the same class.
findings.source_evidence: Source header: `**クラス名:** ``nablarch.fw.handler.HttpResponseHandler``` — XML examples: `<component class="nablarch.fw.web.handler.HttpResponseHandler" />` — No source text connects these two as the same class.

findings.description: `ThreadContextHandler` is referenced in the s5 section content as the mechanism for setting language in the thread context, but it is absent from s5's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: "言語はスレッドコンテキストから取得する。スレッドコンテキストへの言語設定については、:ref:`ThreadContextHandler` を参照。" — Knowledge file s5 content: "言語は :ref:`ThreadContextHandler` で設定されたスレッドコンテキストから取得" — Not present in s5 hints.
